pages.title: Damage & combat
pages.text: $(item)Heroic$() — bonus damage to hostile mobs.$(br)$(item)Berserk$() — damage scales inversely with own health (low HP → more damage).$(br)$(item)Slaughtering$() — increased mob drops on kill.$(br)$(item)Souleater$() — heals on kill; stronger against end-tier mobs.$(br)$(item)Cursed$() — inflicts a Withering-style DoT on hit.

pages.title: Combat quirks
pages.text: $(item)Fracture$() — high chance to break enemy armor durability on hit.$(br)$(item)Crushing$() — ignores a fraction of enemy armor value.$(br)$(item)Cascade$() — chain damage through nearby enemies.$(br)$(item)Resonance$() — bounces small damage back to the attacker on block.$(br)$(item)Unstable$() — small chance to explode on hit; rare but spectacular.
